text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've come to the shrine with Mejiro Ardan, who
hasn't been feeling her best lately. The moment
we arrive, she spots some charms for sale and
comes to a sudden stop.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Pardon me. Seeing these reminded me of my
father.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
He's a successful international businessman and
brings me health charms and amulets from all
corners of the globe in hopes of improving my
condition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
From lucky coins to talismans and even poppet
dolls, he finds all sorts of things.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I expect I'm causing him more concern by
continuing to suffer from ill health.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry. I didn't mean to get sentimental. We're
here to see if we can't aid my recovery, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
O divine one. I thank you for your continued
protection and guidance. Please continue to
watch over me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh, excuse me for a moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's a message from my father. He'll be returning
to the country soon and would like to treat me to
a meal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well, now I've no choice but to break through
these doldrums so he can see me in good health.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan's mood improves by leaps and
bounds, and soon enough, she's back to her usual
self!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...That was my father. He's staying somewhere in
Europe and plans to send me a box of cherries...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The problem is... cherries don't quite suit my
palate...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan looks crestfallen, and her condition
fails to improve.
